caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a conference room. Three individuals, two men and one woman, are seated at individual tables with microphones, suggesting they are speakers or panelists. The woman is positioned in the center, while the two men are on either side of her. Each table has a water bottle and some papers, indicating preparation for a lengthy discussion. The background features a large poster with text and an image of hands, possibly related to the theme of the event. The audience is seated in rows of chairs facing the panel, though only a few attendees are visible. The setting appears formal and professional, likely part of a seminar or conference focused on topics such as science, practice, and healthcare, as suggested by the text on the poster. The panelists seem engaged, with the man on the right leaning forward slightly, possibly emphasizing a point during his speech.
